mapper.insert:
insert into agent_rule(id, agent_id, definition_desc, trigger_condition, trigger_action, create_time, update_time, status, reserve, remark) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.agentId}, #{entity.definitionDesc}, #{entity.triggerCondition}, #{entity.triggerAction}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.reserve}, #{entity.remark})
